CREATE TABLE PartnerLinks (link_name VARCHAR(255), option_name VARCHAR(255), option_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO PartnerLinks (link_name, option_name, option_value) VALUES ('WSSecho', 'service', 'wss-in-encrypt');
INSERT INTO PartnerLinks (link_name, option_name, option_value) VALUES ('WSSecho', 'service', 'wss-in-sign');
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.plink_get_option(link_name, 'service', 'wss-in-encrypt') FROM PartnerLinks WHERE link_name = 'WSSecho';
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.plink_get_option('WSSecho', option_name, option_value) FROM PartnerLinks WHERE link_name = 'WSSecho';
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.plink_get_option('WSSecho', 'service', option_value) FROM PartnerLinks WHERE option_value IN ('wss-in-encrypt', 'wss-in-sign');

SELECT BPEL.BPEL.plink_get_option('WSSecho', 'service', 'wss-in-encrypt') AS encrypt_option, BPEL.BPEL.plink_get_option('WSSecho', 'service', 'wss-in-sign') AS sign_option FROM PartnerLinks WHERE link_name = 'WSSecho';

WITH ServiceOptions AS (SELECT link_name, option_name, option_value FROM PartnerLinks WHERE link_name = 'WSSecho') SELECT BPEL.BPEL.plink_get_option(link_name, option_name, option_value) FROM ServiceOptions;
SELECT DISTINCT BPEL.BPEL.plink_get_option(link_name, 'service', option_value) FROM PartnerLinks WHERE option_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PartnerLinks WHERE BPEL.BPEL.plink_get_option(link_name, 'service', 'wss-in-encrypt') IS NOT NULL;
